installCommand: if [ ! -d flutter ]; then git clone --depth 1 --branch stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git flutter; fi && export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && flutter config --enable-web && flutter precache --web
buildCommand: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && python3 tool/build_web_for_vercel.py || python tool/build_web_for_vercel.py
